==== tluaNoParameterProperties.tlua (5 errors) ====
    // Constructor parameter properties are removed with classes. Modifiers on an
    // ordinary function parameter are always invalid.
    function rejected(
      public a: number,
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1184: Modifiers cannot appear here.
      private b: number,
      ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1184: Modifiers cannot appear here.
      protected c: number,
      ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1184: Modifiers cannot appear here.
      readonly d: number,
      ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1184: Modifiers cannot appear here.
      override e: number,
      ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1184: Modifiers cannot appear here.
    ): number
      return a + b + c + d + e;
    end
